commits: 8fb8f79 - bober(sprint-1): multi-run RunManager with disk persistence and crash recovery

criteriaResults.evidence: RunManager class has getRun, listActiveRuns, abortRun, load + preserved isRunning/getStatus shims
startRun async, awaits writeRunState; state.json exists immediately on return; fields verified
writeRunState uses temp+rename (mirrors src/incident/timeline.ts:86-92). Random hex suffix prevents same-ms collisions. 100-concurrent stress test passes.
load(projectRoot) flips orphaned 'running' to 'failed' with reason 'orchestrator crashed before completion'. 5 tests cover the path.
isRunning walks Map; getStatus returns max-startedAt. Concurrent startRun no longer throws. Tool schemas unchanged.
typecheck/lint/build/test all exit 0. 83 files, 1142 tests pass (was 1116, +26 new). No regressions.

filesChanged.description: Singleton activeRun → Map<runId,RunState>; new methods + back-compat shims

notes: Atomicity: temp file with pid+timestamp+4-byte hex suffix, POSIX rename. Back-compat shims walk the Map; getStatus picks lexicographically-largest ISO startedAt. 5 tool callers (run/anchor/brownfield/solidity/react) needed `await` added since startRun became async. Tool input/output schemas unchanged.
